rules.rule_text:
rule jackpos
{
	meta:
		author = "Brian Wallace @botnet_hunter"
		author_email = "bwall@ballastsecurity.net"
		date = "2014-09-02"
		description = "Identify JackPOS"

	strings:
		$s1 = "%02X-%02X-%02X-%02X-%02X-%02X"
		$s2 = "/post"
		$s3 = "http://"
		$s4 = "&t2="
		$s5 = "&t1="
		$s6 = "mac="

	condition:
		all of them
}
